title: Installed Apps Retrieval Flow
activity_flow: START: Client sends GET /installedApps/ (subdomain: api) with query params { orderBy, desc, page, limit }
DECISION: actor present? → No → throw HttpError(401, 'actor not found in context') → END
DECISION: actor.type.app is set? → Yes → throw HttpError(403, 'Apps are not allowed to access this resource') → END
Default orderBy to 'installed_at' if not provided
DECISION: orderBy in ALLOWED_ORDER_BY ['id','name','uid','title','installed_at']? → No → throw HttpError(400, 'Invalid orderBy field ...') → END
Compute pagination: page = max(req.query.page || 1, 1); limit = clamp(req.query.limit || 100, 1, 100); offset = (page-1)*limit
Resolve orderByField via ORDER_BY_FIELD_MAP; resolve sortDirection ('ASC'|'DESC') from req.query.desc

ASYNC: this.#db.read(SQL SELECT apps.name/uid/title/description/icon/MIN(perm.dt) AS installed_at FROM apps LEFT JOIN user_to_app_permissions WHERE perm.user_id=? GROUP BY apps.id ORDER BY {orderByField} {sortDirection} LIMIT ? OFFSET ?, [actor.type.user.id, limit, offset])
Map each app row: add iconUrl = getAppIconUrl(app)
key_relationships: InstalledAppsController depends_on BaseDatabaseAccessService (constructor injection → private field #db)
method_signatures: constructor(db: BaseDatabaseAccessService): void — stores db in #db
async getInstalledApps(req: Request<null, null, null, { orderBy: string, desc: boolean, page: number, limit: number }>, res: Response): Promise<void>
static_members: ORDER_BY_FIELD_MAP: Record<string,string> = { id:'apps.id', name:'apps.name', uid:'apps.uid', title:'apps.title', installed_at:'installed_at' }
db_query_summary: LEFT JOIN apps + user_to_app_permissions; filter by user_id; GROUP BY app; ORDER BY dynamic field; paginated with LIMIT/OFFSET
response_shape: Array of { name, uid, title, description, icon, installed_at, iconUrl }
important_notes: Controller is part of an extension system (extension.import). Authentication/authorization is request-context driven via req.actor. Apps (non-user actors) are explicitly blocked. Pagination capped at 100 items per page.
